blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
